description: Configures Google Workspace behavioral security controls: login challenges for suspicious activity, account recovery settings, and legacy app blocking. Standard allows self-service recovery, Elevated restricts to admin-only recovery, Strict requires admin identity verification.

risk_profile_effects.standard: Suspicious login challenges enabled. Self-service account recovery. Less secure apps allowed.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: Suspicious login challenges enabled. Admin-only account recovery. Less secure apps blocked.
risk_profile_effects.strict: Suspicious login challenges enabled. Admin-verified recovery only. Less secure apps blocked.

risk_profile.label: Risk Profile
risk_profile.client_description: Your security tier. Controls login challenge aggressiveness and account recovery options.

enable_suspicious_login_challenge.label: Enable Suspicious Login Challenges
enable_suspicious_login_challenge.client_description: Whether Google challenges users with additional verification when suspicious login activity is detected. Enabled for all profiles by default.

account_recovery_method.label: Account Recovery Method
account_recovery_method.client_description: How users can recover their accounts. 'self_service' allows email/phone recovery. 'admin_only' requires IT helpdesk. 'admin_verification' requires IT plus identity verification.

enable_less_secure_apps_block.label: Block Less Secure Apps
enable_less_secure_apps_block.client_description: Block access from apps that use legacy authentication protocols (IMAP, POP, basic SMTP) which cannot use 2SV. Recommended for all environments but may break legacy email clients.

outputs.login_challenges_ou_path: OU path for login challenge policy
outputs.account_recovery_ou_path: OU path for account recovery policy
outputs.less_secure_apps_blocked: Whether less secure apps are blocked
